questions.question: Find the unit vector in the direction of the vector (3, 4) and (2, -1) within 8 hours. Use the dot product method. (6 marks)
A car travels from city A to city B at an average speed of 60 km/h. Find the distance between the two cities within 8 hours, given that the travel time does not include a 30-minute break. (5 marks)

A company has 8 hours to reduce its carbon footprint by 25% through energy-efficient measures. If the current carbon footprint is 500 kg/h, calculate the required reduction in CO2 emissions within the given time frame. (4 marks)
